name: Ax-52
description: This pre-Orokin weapon earned its popularity for its reliability in tough conditions. When hip-firing, its Ammo Efficiency increases. When aiming, headshots have a high Critical Chance.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This pre-Orokin weapon earned its popularity for its reliability in tough conditions. When hip-firing, its Ammo Efficiency increases. When aiming, headshots have a high Critical Chance.

components.name: Efervon Sample
components.description:
A sample of the corrosive substance that Scaldra use to purge Techrot. Handle with care.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)

components.name: Höllvanian Pitchweave Fragment
components.description:
An Efervon-resistant material used to craft Scaldra uniforms.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)

components.name: Techrot Chitin
components.description:
This twisted husk barely resembles the electronic device it once was, consumed and reshaped by the Techrot’s relentless spread.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)

components.name: Techrot Motherboard
components.description:
This motherboard likely served as a nerve center, facilitating the Techrot’s communication network.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
